<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Book Fairies – Creating Passion One Page at a Time</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Lato:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    :root {
      --pink:      #ffa6cb;
      --blue:      #84caed;
      --lavender:  #d7a9ff;
      --sky:       #e0f5ff;
      --blush:     #ffdae9;
      --white:     #ffffff;
      --dark:      #3a2a35;
      --text:      #5a3e50;
      --gold:      #c9a96e;
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
      color: var(--text);
      background: var(--white);
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* ─── NAV ─── */
    nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 14px 48px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,166,203,0.25);
      box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(255,166,203,0.12);
    }

    .nav-logo {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .nav-logo img { height: 48px; width: 48px; object-fit: contain; }
    .nav-brand {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      color: var(--dark);
      line-height: 1.1;
    }
    .nav-brand span { display: block; font-size: 0.65rem; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: var(--pink); font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; }

    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a {
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text);
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--pink); }

    /* ─── HERO ─── */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 120px 24px 80px;
      background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--blush) 0%, var(--sky) 50%, #f3e8ff 100%);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    #hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 600px 400px at 20% 80%, rgba(132,202,237,0.22) 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 500px 350px at 80% 20%, rgba(215,169,255,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .hero-inner {
      position: relative;
      max-width: 820px;
      animation: fadeUp 1s ease both;
    }
    .hero-logo {
      width: 160px; height: 160px;
      object-fit: contain;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 32px rgba(255,166,203,0.38));
      animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes float {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
      50%       { transform: translateY(-12px); }
    }
    @keyframes fadeUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    .hero-tag {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.25em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--pink);
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .hero-title {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 7vw, 5rem);
      color: var(--dark);
      line-height: 1.1;
      margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .hero-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--pink); }

    .hero-sub {
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--text);
      max-width: 560px;
      margin: 0 auto 40px;
      line-height: 1.75;
    }

    .btn-group { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .btn {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 15px 36px;
      border-radius: 50px;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: none;
    }
    .btn:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.14); }
    .btn-primary {
      background: var(--pink);
      color: var(--white);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(255,166,203,0.4);
    }
    .btn-outline {
      background: transparent;
      border: 2px solid var(--dark);
      color: var(--dark);
    }

    /* ─── SECTIONS ─── */
    section { padding: 96px 24px; }
    .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

    .section-tag {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--pink);
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .section-title {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
      color: var(--dark);
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      line-height: 1.2;
    }
    .section-sub {
      text-align: center;
      max-width: 620px;
      margin: 0 auto 60px;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    /* ─── ABOUT ─── */
    #about { background: var(--white); }
    .about-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 64px;
      align-items: center;
    }
    @media (max-width: 760px) { .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

    .about-visual {
      position: relative;
    }
    .about-card {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blush), var(--sky));
      border-radius: 24px;
      padding: 56px 40px;
      text-align: center;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(255,166,203,0.2);
    }
    .about-card img { width: 110px; height: 110px; object-fit: contain; margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .about-card p {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-style: italic;
      font-size: 1.25rem;
      color: var(--dark);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .about-content p {
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      line-height: 1.85;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      font-weight: 300;
    }
    .founders-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      background: var(--blush);
      border-radius: 50px;
      padding: 10px 22px;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      color: var(--dark);
      margin-top: 8px;
    }
    .founders-badge span { font-size: 1.4rem; }

    /* ─── WHAT WE DO ─── */
    #what-we-do { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--sky) 0%, var(--white) 100%); }
    .cards-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
      gap: 28px;
    }
    .card {
      background: var(--white);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 36px 28px;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
      border-top: 4px solid var(--pink);
      transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s;
    }
    .card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(255,166,203,0.2); }
    .card:nth-child(2) { border-top-color: var(--blue); }
    .card:nth-child(3) { border-top-color: var(--lavender); }
    .card:nth-child(4) { border-top-color: var(--gold); }

    .card-icon { font-size: 2.4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .card h3 {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: 1.25rem;
      color: var(--dark);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .card p { font-size: 0.96rem; line-height: 1.75; font-weight: 300; }

    /* ─── IMPACT ─── */
    #impact { background: var(--dark); }
    #impact .section-tag { color: var(--pink); }
    #impact .section-title { color: var(--white); }
    #impact .section-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }

    .impact-stats {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
      gap: 32px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .stat { padding: 32px 20px; }
    .stat-num {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: 3.2rem;
      color: var(--pink);
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .stat-label { font-size: 0.9rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); letter-spacing: 0.05em; line-height: 1.5; }

    /* ─── VOLUNTEER ─── */
    #volunteer { background: var(--white); }
    .vol-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 56px;
      align-items: start;
    }
    @media (max-width: 760px) { .vol-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

    .vol-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
    .vol-list li {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 14px;
      font-size: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.65;
    }
    .vol-dot {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 28px; height: 28px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--pink);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: white;
      margin-top: 2px;
    }

    .vol-cta {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blush), #f3e8ff);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 40px 32px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .vol-cta h3 {
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      color: var(--dark);
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .vol-cta p { font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 28px; font-weight: 300; }

    /* ─── DONATE ─── */
    #donate { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blush) 0%, var(--sky) 100%); }
    .donate-box {
      background: var(--white);
      border-radius: 24px;
      max-width: 700px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 56px 48px;
      box-shadow: 0 16px 60px rgba(255,166,203,0.18);
      text-align: center;
    }
    .donate-box p { font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 32px; font-weight: 300; }

    /* ─── PARTNER ─── */
    #partner { background: var(--white); }
    .partner-inner {
      max-width: 780px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .partner-inner p { font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 36px; font-weight: 300; }

    /* ─── FAQ ─── */
    #faq { background: var(--sky); }
    .faq-list { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
    .faq-item {
      background: var(--white);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    }
    .faq-q {
      width: 100%; text-align: left;
      background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
      padding: 22px 28px;
      font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      color: var(--dark);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .faq-q::after { content: '+'; font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--pink); flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 0.25s; }
    .faq-item.open .faq-q::after { transform: rotate(45deg); }
    .faq-a {
      max-height: 0; overflow: hidden;
      transition: max-height 0.3s ease, padding 0.3s ease;
      padding: 0 28px;
      font-size: 0.98rem;
      line-height: 1.75;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--text);
    }
    .faq-item.open .faq-a { max-height: 300px; padding: 0 28px 22px; }

    /* ─── CONTACT ─── */
    #contact { background: var(--dark); text-align: center; padding: 80px 24px; }
    #contact .section-tag { color: var(--pink); }
    #contact .section-title { color: var(--white); }
    .contact-body { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 36px; font-weight: 300; }
    .contact-links { display: flex; gap: 20px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .contact-link {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      color: var(--white);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
      border-radius: 50px;
      padding: 12px 28px;
      transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .contact-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-color: var(--pink); }

    /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
    footer {
      background: #2a1e27;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 24px;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Book Fairies logo" />
    <div class="nav-brand">
      Book Fairies
      <span>Fulton County, GA</span>
    </div>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#what-we-do">What We Do</a></li>
    <li><a href="#volunteer">Volunteer</a></li>
    <li><a href="#donate">Donate</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Book Fairies wings" class="hero-logo" />
    <p class="hero-tag">Fulton County · Community Literacy Initiative</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Creating Passion<br /><em>One Page at a Time</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">We collect and distribute books to underserved students and families across Fulton County school communities — because every child deserves the joy of reading.</p>
    <div class="btn-group">
      <a href="#donate" class="btn btn-primary">Donate Books</a>
      <a href="#volunteer" class="btn btn-outline">Get Involved</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-visual">
        <div class="about-card">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Book Fairies logo" />
          <p>"Books inspire imagination, confidence, education, and opportunity — and every child deserves access to those opportunities."</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-content">
        <p class="section-tag" style="text-align:left;">Our Story</p>
        <h2 class="section-title" style="text-align:left; font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:24px;">Meet the Founders</h2>
        <p>Book Fairies was founded by Marin DuMond and Lauren Holbrook with a shared goal of making reading more accessible to children throughout the community.</p>
        <p>After recognizing that many students lacked access to books outside the classroom, we created Book Fairies to bridge that gap through donation drives, volunteer efforts, and community connections.</p>
        <p>Our mission is simple: help every child build a love for reading and create a joy for learning.</p>
        <div class="founders-badge"><span>🦋</span> Marin DuMond &amp; Lauren Holbrook</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHAT WE DO -->
<section id="what-we-do">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-tag">Our Programs</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">What We Do</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">From collection to distribution, we work at every step to make sure books reach the hands of children who need them most.</p>
    <div class="cards-grid">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-icon">📚</div>
        <h3>Community Book Drives</h3>
        <p>We organize book drives throughout schools, neighborhoods, and local organizations to collect new and gently used books for children of all ages.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-icon">🎁</div>
        <h3>Book Distribution</h3>
        <p>Donated books are carefully sorted and distributed to underserved schools, community centers, and youth programs throughout Fulton County.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-icon">🤝</div>
        <h3>Volunteer Opportunities</h3>
        <p>Students and community members can help organize donations, sort books, and support literacy events — and earn volunteer service hours.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-icon">📢</div>
        <h3>Literacy Advocacy</h3>
        <p>We raise awareness about childhood literacy and the importance of equal access to educational resources across our community.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- IMPACT -->
<section id="impact">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-tag">Growing Impact</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Our Growing Impact</h2>
    <p class="section-sub" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);">Every book donated opens a new world for a child in need. Here's how we're making a difference across Fulton County.</p>
    <div class="impact-stats">
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">100s</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Books donated to<br />local schools</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">∞</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Stories shared &amp;<br />imaginations sparked</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">Many</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Student-led volunteer<br />initiatives</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">All</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Fulton County schools<br />supported</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- VOLUNTEER -->
<section id="volunteer">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-tag">Join Us</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Get Involved</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Volunteers are essential to the Book Fairies mission. Your support helps us reach more students across the community.</p>
    <div class="vol-grid">
      <div>
        <ul class="vol-list">
          <li><div class="vol-dot">📦</div><span>Organize a book drive in your school, neighborhood, or organization</span></li>
          <li><div class="vol-dot">🚗</div><span>Sign up for a pickup — we'll handle the rest</span></li>
          <li><div class="vol-dot">📖</div><span>Help sort and organize book donations at distribution events</span></li>
          <li><div class="vol-dot">📣</div><span>Promote literacy initiatives and spread the word on social media</span></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="vol-cta">
        <h3>Earn Service Hours</h3>
        <p>Students are welcome to volunteer with Book Fairies and earn community service hours through participation. Reach out to request opportunities.</p>
        <a href="mailto:bookfairiesgeorgia@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">Email Us to Volunteer</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DONATE -->
<section id="donate">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="donate-box">
      <p class="section-tag" style="text-align:center;">Donate Books</p>
      <h2 class="section-title" style="font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:24px;">Help a Child Discover Stories</h2>
      <p>Your donations help children discover new stories, improve literacy skills, and develop a lifelong love of reading. We accept all books — children's books, early readers, middle school novels, and educational materials are always appreciated.</p>
      <p style="font-size:0.95rem; background:var(--blush); border-radius:12px; padding:16px 20px; margin-bottom:32px; line-height:1.7; font-weight:400;">
        📅 Book donation pickups happen on a monthly basis, available almost every Sunday. Sign the pickup form for your preferred date and let us take care of the rest!
      </p>
      <a href="mailto:bookfairiesgeorgia@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">Contact Us to Donate</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PARTNER -->
<section id="partner">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="partner-inner">
      <p class="section-tag">Community Partnerships</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Partner With Us</h2>
      <p>Book Fairies partners with schools, libraries, local businesses, and nonprofit organizations to expand access to books and educational resources. Together, we can help create brighter futures through literacy.</p>
      <a href="mailto:bookfairiesgeorgia@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">Become a Partner</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ -->
<section id="faq">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-tag">Common Questions</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">FAQ</h2>
    <div class="faq-list">
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q">Where are the books donated?</button>
        <div class="faq-a">Books are distributed to underserved schools, students, and community organizations throughout Fulton County.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q">Can students volunteer?</button>
        <div class="faq-a">Yes! Student volunteers are welcome and may earn community service hours through participation. Email bookfairiesgeorgia@gmail.com to request opportunities.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q">What books are most needed?</button>
        <div class="faq-a">We take all books! Children's books, early readers, middle school novels, and educational materials are always appreciated.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q">How can organizations partner with Book Fairies?</button>
        <div class="faq-a">Schools, businesses, and local organizations can contact us to organize donation drives or literacy initiatives.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q">How do I donate books?</button>
        <div class="faq-a">Book donations drop on a monthly basis and are available almost all Sundays in the month. Sign the pickup form for your preferred date, and let us take care of the rest!</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-tag">Reach Out</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Contact Book Fairies</h2>
    <p class="contact-body">Interested in donating, volunteering, or partnering with us?<br />We'd love to hear from you and work together to expand literacy opportunities throughout the community.</p>
    <div class="contact-links">
      <a href="mailto:bookfairiesgeorgia@gmail.com" class="contact-link">✉️ bookfairiesgeorgia@gmail.com</a>
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/bookfairiesgeorgia" target="_blank" class="contact-link">📸 Instagram @bookfairiesgeorgia</a>
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/bookfairiesgeorgia" target="_blank" class="contact-link">📘 Facebook @bookfairiesgeorgia</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <p>&copy; 2025 Book Fairies · Fulton County, Georgia · Creating Passion One Page at a Time 🦋</p>
</footer>

<script>
  // FAQ accordion
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-q').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const item = btn.closest('.faq-item');
      const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
      document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
      if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
    });
  });

  // Scroll-based nav shadow
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    document.querySelector('nav').style.boxShadow =
      window.scrollY > 20 ? '0 4px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)' : '0 2px 18px rgba(255,166,203,0.12)';
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
